abilities.name: Science Guild Support
abilities.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Infantry**^^ units (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability), this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Resource Transmutation
abilities.text: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, one model with this ability can choose to use it when it is selected to shoot. If it does, you must spend 1YP and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [^^**Sustained Hits 1**^^] ability and, after that model has shot this phase, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, you can gain up to 2YP.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only attack that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements or Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Break the Foe
abilities.text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abilities.name: Relentless Avalanche
abilities.text: You can target this model's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Cthonian Beserks**^^

abilities.name: Multi-spectral visor
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Brôkhyr Guild Support
abilities.text: While this unit is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle**^^ or ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks**^^ units, if this unit is not an attached unit, it has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS
- BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN

abilities.name: Unit Composition
abilities.text: If this unit’s Brôkhyr Iron‑master model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining E‑COG models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each E‑COG model takes up the space of 0 models.

abilities.name: Forgewrought Expertise
abilities.text: At the end of your Movement phase, this model can repair one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle, Exoframe^^** or ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks^^** unit within 3" of it. One model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if this unit contains an Ironkin Assistant model. Each unit can only be repaired once per turn.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only attack that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements or Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Breaching Fire
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only attack that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements or Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Grudge-fuelled Fortitude
abilities.text: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Unhinged Vengeance
abilities.text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this model can make a Vengeance move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the result: it moves a number of inches up to this result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft**^^). When doing so, it can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This model cannot make a Vengeance move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Vengeance move per phase.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only attack that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements or Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Cyberstimms
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding one to the result if units from your army have Fortify Takeover: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts

abilities.name: Guerrilla Adepts
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only attack that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements or Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Firebase Control (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Infantry^^** unit is wholly within 6" of this ^^**Transport^^**, ranged weapons equipped by models in that ^^**Infantry^^** unit have the [^^**sustained hits 1^^**] ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators, Ironkin Steeljacks with Melee Weapons**^^

abilities.name: Forgewrought Skill
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Einhyr
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Forgewrought Expertise
abilities.text: At the end of your Movement phase, this model can repair one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle, Exoframe**^^ or **^^Ironkin Steeljacks**^^ unit within 3" of it. One model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each unit can only be repaired once per turn.

abilities.name: Kindred Hero
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Lethal Hits^^] ability.

abilities.name: Rampart Crest
abilities.text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Teleport Crest
abilities.text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Ancestral Fortune
abilities.text: Once per turn, you can spend 1YP to change one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to a 6.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- Einhyr Hearthguard
- Hearthkyn Warriors

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Grim Efficiency
abilities.text: Once per battle round, when a friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann**^^ unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.
